title: This company pays up to $1000 for one referral #affiliatemarketing
spoken_script: HubSpot affiliate program pays up to one thousand dollars per person you refer. Their CRM is genuinely the best free option for small businesses. So recommending it honestly is easy. One referral per month at their average payout is real money. Ahrefs pays 200 dollars per sale. WP Engine pays 200 plus. Kinsta pays 10 percent recurring forever. You do not need a huge audience. You need the right content in front of the right person. Full affiliate program breakdown at link in bio.
